text: Hello. Hello, can I help you? Are you there? Yes. How can I help you? Hello. Good afternoon. This is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Michigan State Relief Program. So, have you been notified about these benefits yet? Man, I'm not qualified, baby. So we actually work with the largest network of Medicare providers, and I'd love to help you get your eligibility sorted out. You're on Part A and Part B, I take it? Yes, ma'am. Perfect. You qualify for the benefits. I'm forwarding you to our supervisor. Please hold on. Yeah, thanks for holding on the line. This is Mark Wilson. How are you doing today? I'm fine, sir. How are you?
